# HomeUP
> HomeUP is a Singapore fixed-fee property advisory operated by C & H Properties Pte Ltd (CEA L3007139C). HDB sellers from $1,999, condo/EC from $4,999, landed from $9,999 (plus GST). Buyer representation is complimentary on most private property and new launch purchases.

## Key pages
- `Home -> https://homeup.sg/`: Fixed-fee selling and buying overview, pricing comparison, FAQs, and savings calculator.
- `About -> https://homeup.sg/about`: Company details, office address, CEA licence, parent company Haus Plus Pte. Ltd. (UEN 202538756D).
- `Sell -> https://homeup.sg/sell`: Sell HDB, condo, or landed at a transparent flat fee.
- `Sell HDB -> https://homeup.sg/sell-hdb`: HDB resale selling process, CPF, valuation, and fixed $1,999 fee.
- `Sell condo -> https://homeup.sg/sell-condo`: Condo and EC resale at a fixed $4,999 fee.
- `Sell landed -> https://homeup.sg/sell-landed`: Landed property resale at a fixed $9,999 fee.
- `Buy -> https://homeup.sg/buy`: Buyer representation packages and complimentary private-property service.
- `Buy HDB -> https://homeup.sg/buy-hdb`: HDB resale buying guide and $1,999 buyer representation.
- `Buy condo / landed -> https://homeup.sg/buy-condo-landed`: Private resale buying with complimentary representation.
- `Buy new launch -> https://homeup.sg/buy-new-launch`: New launch condo buying with complimentary representation.
- `Listings -> https://homeup.sg/listings`: Active HDB, condo, and landed listings across Singapore.
- `Playbook -> https://homeup.sg/playbook`: Property guides and video tips for buyers, sellers, and upgraders in Singapore.
- `Agents -> https://homeup.sg/agents`: CEA-licensed HomeUP advisors with credentials and contact details.

## APIs and authentication
- `API catalog -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/api-catalog`: Machine-readable index of public JSON APIs.
- `Public listings API -> https://homeup.sg/api/public/listings`: Active listings (no auth required).
- `OAuth protected resource -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource`: RFC 9728 metadata for protected admin APIs.
- `OAuth authorization server -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server`: OAuth 2.0 discovery with agent_auth registration block.
- `OpenID Connect -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/openid-configuration`: OIDC discovery for Supabase-backed sign-in.
- `auth.md -> https://homeup.sg/auth.md`: Agent registration and credential instructions.
- `MCP server card -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json`: MCP tool discovery for listings search.
- `Agent skills -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json`: Published agent skill index.
- `Agent index -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/agent-index.json`: HTTPS agent discovery index.
- `DNS-AID manifest -> https://homeup.sg/.well-known/dns-aid.json`: Required DNS SVCB/HTTPS records and DNSSEC steps.

## Markdown for agents
Send `Accept: text/markdown` on any public HTML page to receive a markdown representation (for example `/`, `/about`, `/listings`).

## Facts for citation
- Operating agency: C & H Properties Pte Ltd, CEA licence L3007139C
- Verify licence: https://eservices.cea.gov.sg/aceas/public-register/ (search L3007139C or +65 8087 7015)
- CEA regulator: https://www.cea.gov.sg/
- Office: 125A Lor 2 Toa Payoh #02-138, Singapore 311125
- Phone: +65 8087 7015 (Mon to Sun, 9am to 9pm)
- Fixed seller fees (before GST): HDB $1,999, condo/EC $4,999, landed $9,999
- 1,000+ transactions closed; 120+ active listings
- Parent brand owner: Haus Plus Pte. Ltd., UEN 202538756D

## Contact
- Website: https://homeup.sg
- Privacy: https://homeup.sg/privacy-policy
